statement_preview: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS asymmetric_route_guard_events_v1 ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT NOT NULL, guard_name TEXT NOT NULL, guard_status TEXT NOT NULL, route_effect TEXT NOT NULL, payload_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS asymmetric_speculative_route_policy_v1 ( policy_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, policy_name TEXT NOT NULL, locked INTEGER NOT NULL, paper_live_allowed_now INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, runtime_now INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, meaning TEXT NOT NULL, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS command_center_output_contract_v1 ( contract_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, field_name TEXT NOT NULL, required INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, source_layer TEXT NOT NULL, visible INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, apply_now INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS decision_binding_evaluation_events_v1 ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT NOT NULL, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, final_quality_label TEXT NOT NULL, final_route_effect TEXT NOT NULL, primary_block_reason TEXT, winning_rule TEXT NOT NULL, permission_status TEXT NOT NULL, decision_conflict_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', input_summary_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', payload_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS decision_binding_rule_policy_v1 ( policy_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, rule_name TEXT NOT NULL, precedence INTEGER NOT NULL, condition_text TEXT NOT NULL, decision_label TEXT NOT NULL, route_effect TEXT NOT NULL, locked INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, runtime_now INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dex_microstructure_signal_policy_v1 ( policy_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, signal_name TEXT NOT NULL, primary_signal INTEGER NOT NULL, cex_replacement TEXT, can_bypass_risk INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, runtime_now INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dex_microstructure_technical_evidence_events_v1 ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT NOT NULL, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, signal_name TEXT NOT NULL, signal_value TEXT, technical_status TEXT NOT NULL, technical_confidence TEXT NOT NULL, volume_quality TEXT NOT NULL, liquidity_support_status TEXT NOT NULL, wallet_diversity_status TEXT NOT NULL, manipulation_status TEXT NOT NULL, can_bypass_risk_gate INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, payload_json TEXT NOT NULL

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS emergency_monitor_trigger_events_v1 ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT NOT NULL, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, trigger_name TEXT NOT NULL, source_event_uid TEXT, priority_lane TEXT NOT NULL, action_required TEXT NOT NULL, route_effect TEXT NOT NULL, recheck_required INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, payload_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS emergency_monitor_trigger_policy_v1 ( policy_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, trigger_name TEXT NOT NULL, source_name TEXT NOT NULL, priority_lane TEXT NOT NULL, bypass_periodic INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, planned_action TEXT NOT NULL, runtime_now INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS execution_threshold_evaluation_events_v1 ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT NOT NULL, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, field_name TEXT NOT NULL, field_value TEXT, threshold_status TEXT NOT NULL, decision_effect TEXT NOT NULL, route_effect TEXT NOT NULL, payload_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS execution_threshold_policy_v1 ( policy_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, field_name TEXT NOT NULL, required INTEGER NOT NULL, unknown_policy TEXT NOT NULL, routine_safe_policy TEXT NOT NULL, asymmetric_policy TEXT NOT NULL, hard_block_policy TEXT NOT NULL, source_class TEXT NOT NULL, runtime_now INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS negative_memory_lookup_events_v1 ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT NOT NULL, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, memory_key TEXT NOT NULL, memory_value_hash TEXT NOT NULL, match_status TEXT NOT NULL, match_severity TEXT NOT NULL, source_ref TEXT, decision_effect TEXT NOT NULL, route_effect TEXT NOT NULL, confirmed_status TEXT NOT NULL, payload_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS negative_memory_lookup_policy_v1 ( policy_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, memory_key TEXT NOT NULL, match_type TEXT NOT NULL, severity_if_confirmed TEXT NOT NULL, unknown_policy TEXT NOT NULL, can_bypass_risk INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, runtime_now INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stale_data_guard_evaluation_events_v1 ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT NOT NULL, source_class TEXT NOT NULL, last_updated_block INTEGER, current_block_reference INTEGER, evidence_age_blocks INTEGER, last_updated_timestamp TEXT, current_timestamp_reference TEXT, evidence_age_seconds INTEGER, stale_status TEXT NOT NULL, decision_effect TEXT NOT NULL, route_permission_effect TEXT NOT NULL, payload_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stale_data_guard_policy_v1 ( policy_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, source_class TEXT NOT NULL, fresh_after_blocks INTEGER NOT NULL, fresh_after_seconds INTEGER NOT NULL, stale_after_blocks INTEGER NOT NULL, stale_after_seconds INTEGER NOT NULL, expired_after_blocks INTEGER NOT NULL, expired_after_seconds INTEGER NOT NULL, route_permission_effect TEXT NOT NULL, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS state_aggregated_token_command_output_v1 ( output_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT NOT NULL, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, token_symbol TEXT, final_quality_label TEXT NOT NULL, route_effect TEXT NOT NULL, permission_status TEXT NOT NULL, primary_block_reason TEXT, winning_rule TEXT NOT NULL, next_required_evidence TEXT, stale_status TEXT, emergency_status TEXT, negative_memory_status TEXT, technical_status TEXT, execution_status TEXT, asymmetric_status TEXT,

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "state_aggregated_token_decision_labels_v1" ( "state_uid" TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "token_uid" TEXT NOT NULL, "chain" TEXT NOT NULL, "payload_json" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "created_at_utc" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at_utc" TEXT NOT NULL, "state_kind" TEXT NOT NULL, "state_value" TEXT )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "state_aggregated_token_freshness_v1" ( "state_uid" TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "token_uid" TEXT NOT NULL, "chain" TEXT NOT NULL, "last_updated_block" INTEGER, "last_updated_timestamp" TEXT NOT NULL, "source_event_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "evidence_age_blocks" INTEGER, "evidence_age_seconds" INTEGER, "stale_after_blocks" INTEGER NOT NULL, "stale_after_seconds" INTEGER NOT NULL, "stale_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "payload_json" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "created_at_utc" TE

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "state_aggregated_token_missing_evidence_v1" ( "state_uid" TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "token_uid" TEXT NOT NULL, "chain" TEXT NOT NULL, "payload_json" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "created_at_utc" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at_utc" TEXT NOT NULL, "state_kind" TEXT NOT NULL, "state_value" TEXT )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "state_aggregated_token_negative_memory_summary_v1" ( "state_uid" TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "token_uid" TEXT NOT NULL, "chain" TEXT NOT NULL, "payload_json" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "created_at_utc" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at_utc" TEXT NOT NULL, "state_kind" TEXT NOT NULL, "state_value" TEXT )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS state_aggregated_token_readmodel_v1 ( readmodel_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT NOT NULL, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, token_symbol TEXT, token_name TEXT, final_quality_label TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'WAIT_MORE_DATA', decision_label TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'WAIT_MORE_DATA', route_effect TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'NO_ROUTE', permission_status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'NO_PAPER_LIVE_PERMISSION', primary_block_reason TEXT, winning_rule TEXT, next_required_evidence TEXT, s

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "state_aggregated_token_risk_block_reasons_v1" ( "state_uid" TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "token_uid" TEXT NOT NULL, "chain" TEXT NOT NULL, "payload_json" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "created_at_utc" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at_utc" TEXT NOT NULL, "state_kind" TEXT NOT NULL, "state_value" TEXT )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "state_aggregated_token_source_map_v1" ( "state_uid" TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "token_uid" TEXT NOT NULL, "chain" TEXT NOT NULL, "payload_json" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "created_at_utc" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at_utc" TEXT NOT NULL, "state_kind" TEXT NOT NULL, "state_value" TEXT )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "state_aggregated_token_technical_evidence_summary_v1" ( "state_uid" TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "token_uid" TEXT NOT NULL, "chain" TEXT NOT NULL, "payload_json" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "created_at_utc" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at_utc" TEXT NOT NULL, "state_kind" TEXT NOT NULL, "state_value" TEXT )
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_asym_guard_status ON asymmetric_route_guard_events_v1 (guard_status)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_asym_guard_token ON asymmetric_route_guard_events_v1 (token_uid)
